Bash(sqlite3 "NOTION DIARY FETCHER/data/notion_diary.db" "SELECT 'queued', \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM reel_scripts WHERE status='queued'\) + \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM content_drafts WHERE status='queued'\);" "SELECT 'ready_ahead', \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM reel_scripts WHERE status IN \('approved','recorded'\)\) + \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM content_drafts WHERE status IN \('approved','recorded'\)\);" "SELECT 'rows_needing_asana_reels', COUNT\(*\) FROM reel_scripts WHERE status IN \('approved','recorded'\) AND asana_task_gid IS NULL;" "SELECT 'rows_needing_asana_drafts', COUNT\(*\) FROM content_drafts WHERE status IN \('approved','recorded'\) AND asana_task_gid IS NULL;" "SELECT 'posted_needs_complete_reels', COUNT\(*\) FROM reel_scripts WHERE status='posted' AND asana_task_gid IS NOT NULL;" "SELECT 'posted_needs_complete_drafts', COUNT\(*\) FROM content_drafts WHERE status='posted' AND asana_task_gid IS NOT NULL;" "SELECT 'killed_needs_complete_reels', COUNT\(*\) FROM reel_scripts WHERE status='killed' AND asana_task_gid IS NOT NULL;" "SELECT 'killed_needs_complete_drafts', COUNT\(*\) FROM content_drafts WHERE status='killed' AND asana_task_gid IS NOT NULL;")

Bash(sqlite3 -header -column "NOTION DIARY FETCHER/data/notion_diary.db" "SELECT id, status, asana_task_gid, substr\(generated_text,1,40\) FROM reel_scripts WHERE status IN \('approved','recorded'\);" "SELECT id, status, asana_task_gid, substr\(generated_text,1,40\) FROM content_drafts WHERE status IN \('approved','recorded'\);")
Bash(sqlite3 -separator '|||' "NOTION DIARY FETCHER/data/notion_diary.db" "SELECT id, generated_text FROM reel_scripts WHERE id IN \(9,11\);")

Bash(sqlite3 "NOTION DIARY FETCHER/data/notion_diary.db" "UPDATE reel_scripts SET asana_task_gid='1215777397965828' WHERE id=9; UPDATE reel_scripts SET asana_task_gid='1215768738837723' WHERE id=11;")
Bash(sqlite3 -header -column "NOTION DIARY FETCHER/data/notion_diary.db" "SELECT id, status, asana_task_gid FROM reel_scripts WHERE id IN \(9,11\);")
